name: webpage-capture-tool
description: Monorepo for the webpage capture CLI and Electron app

scripts.lint: node --check apps/electron/main.js && node --check apps/electron/preload.js && node --check apps/electron/renderer/renderer.js && node --check packages/cli/bin/screenshot.js && node --check packages/cli/src/run-capture.js && node --check packages/core/index.js && node --check packages/core/src/data-loader.js && node --check packages/core/src/options.js && node --check packages/core/src/screenshot-runner.js
